programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Realtor to the stars Linda Stein is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment, but her larger-than-life personality meant Linda made enemies as well as admirers; with evidence from the crime scene, only painstaking sleuthing can identify her killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a retired cop is found shot to death on a subway train in Brooklyn, detectives soon discover that his death is linked to two other seemingly random shootings in the previous thirteen hours.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a sibling dispute over money turns into a double murder, all of Brooklyn is on alert for the missing killer; days turn into months and then years, as the NYPD manhunt turns into a national and international chase for the fugitive.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found hidden in tall reeds in a quiet park near her home, fear grips the Queens neighborhood; after months of ceaseless investigation, a clue from the past leads NYPD detectives to an unexpected killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Days before the New Millennium, a jailed informant calls the NYPD with a cryptic tip about a murder, sending detectives on a hunt through dozens of New York's high-rise buildings, in search of a crime scene - and a body.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Two young women come to New York with big city dreams, but a chance encounter triggers a sequence of events that shatters those dreams forever; detectives must piece together a series of puzzling clues to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Roger Brooks, popular maître d' at one of the oldest restaurants in New York, is found slain in his apartment on the city's famous Restaurant Row; detectives discover a hidden side to the victim, and the chilling possibility of other victims.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a young banker disappears, police piece together her final moments, leading them to a professional who's not as he presents himself.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a beloved Queens gay man, a community bands together while a detective goes undercover to catch the killers.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Everyone in East Harlem knows Jason Adams and is shocked when his body is found stabbed; detectives are stumped until a tip from an unexpected source points them toward the killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Talented performer Jennifer Stahl and four friends are discovered shot execution-style above New York's iconic Carnegie Deli in the theater district; when the news breaks, the entire city fears there's a cold-blooded killer on the loose.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A mass shooting in Chelsea leaves one dead and three injured; the detective discovers this is the latest in a series of murders spanning multiple precincts; investigators find themselves plunged into the underground world of New York's bouncers.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives race to unravel the strange murder of one of their own before a devious killer slips out of the country.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: An indie film star is found dead in Greenwich Village, the victim of an apparent suicide; as detectives discover one eerie clue after another, they realize things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When police discover two murdered lovers in East Harlem, a stolen phone leads them on a journey into the heart of New York's criminal underground and beyond.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a prominent Russian businessman goes missing from a ritzy neighborhood in Staten Island, investigators believe the Russian mob is to blame; the case takes a series of hairpin turns to reveal the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives hunt for the killer who tortured and executed a beloved New York City public school teacher; they discover the victim is the son of a powerful businessman.

programme.desc: When the Pokémon Egg given to Ash goes missing, our heroes call on the help of a hapless Officer Jenny. It isn't long before they realize that if they want the Egg back, they'll have to find it themselves!

programme.title: Pokémon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Pokémon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Jessie, James, and Meowth take time to lick their wounds and dream of stealing Pikachu for the glory of Team Rocket. After a chance meeting with a Team Rocket scout, it seems these dreams are blasting off before their eyes!

programme.title: Pokémon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, Misty y Pikachu se encuentran muy perdidos en las montañas. Mientras se apresuran por un camino irregular que no aparece en su mapa, ¡de repente oyen una gran explosión!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡En su camino hacia el siguiente reto de Batalla de Gimnasio parece que se han perdido. ¡Ash y sus amigos llegan a una enorme mansión que parece ser la guarida oculta de un ninja! ¿Acaso será el Gimnasio Fucsia?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de tomar el lugar de la herida Lara, ¿podrá Ash controlar a su feroz Ponyta y guiarlo para ganar la carrera anual?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes acompañan a la Oficial Jenny al interior del bosque en persecución de unos cazadores. Pronto descubren a un niño en medio de una manada de Kangaskhan. Su nombre es Tommy y nadie sabe el secreto de su infancia.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de encontrar un muy largo puente que sólo puede cruzarse en bicicleta, un trabajo repartiendo medicina es el boleto perfecto para que Ash y sus amigos lleguen a Pueblo Soleado.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Atrapados en un repentino chubasco, nuestros héroes rápidamente buscan refugio. Tras arrastrar a una renuente Misty, Ash y Brock entran a una cabaña, ¡y de inmediato tienen la impresión de que no están solos!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos descubren a un grupo de Pikachu salvajes, y aunque al principio parecen asustados por el intruso, el grupo eventualmente confía en el Pikachu de Ash. ¿Qué sentirá Pikachu al ver a otros como él en la naturaleza?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos encuentran una enorme casa con una fiesta de jardín en marcha a la que asisten los Entrenadores de los Pokémon que evolucionan usando Rocas Evolutivas. ¿Estará aquí el Entrenador del Eevee abandonado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros hambrientos héroes llegan a una pequeña aldea. A cambio de una comida, Ash, Misty y Brock aceptan investigar qué está causando que se seque el río, lo cual destruye la cosecha de la aldea.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Acompañamos a nuestros héroes a las afueras de Ciudad Oscura, la cual parece estar desierta. No hay nadie en las calles, incluso a mediodía. ¿Qué volvió a este un lugar tan desolado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash entrena rigurosamente incluso en las vacaciones de primavera, ¡hasta que nuestros héroes descubren que hay un carnaval rodante cercano! ¡Ash, Misty y Brock pronto se unen a la diversión de la feria!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Aún en persecución de nuestros héroes, el Equipo Rocket está listo para otro intento de atrapar a Pikachu, ¡hasta que el desastre se presenta! Pronto se vuelve evidente que Meowth está enfermándose.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Haciendo a un lado su idea de atrapar a Jigglypuff por ahora, Misty promete hallar una solución para la situación de canto de este Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Según el rival de Ash, Gary, se han descubierto fósiles de Pokémon extintos en el área, iniciando una gran fiebre de fósiles en el cañón. ¡Ash decide unirse a las excavaciones para tratar de derrotar a Gary!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash duerme pacíficamente hasta que es despertado por Brock y Misty con alarmantes noticias: ¡Algo le pasa a la voz de Pikachu! Preocupado, Ash corre con Pikachu en busca del Centro Pokémon más cercano.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes caminan por la campiña, notan un anuncio de "Personas desaparecidas" con un rostro innegablemente conocido: ¡es exactamente igual que James del Equipo Rocket! ¿De verdad es él el del anuncio?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes discuten el rumor de que un raro Farfetch’d salvaje ha sido visto en el área. Tanto Ash como Misty prometen atraparlo, ¡y pronto tienen su oportunidad cuando el Pokémon aparece!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al dejar el Centro Pokémon, nuestros héroes discuten lo que creen que saldrá del huevo Pokémon que Ash descubrió. Cerca, el Equipo Rocket comienza a empollar otro atrevido plan para hacerlo suyo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En una batalla con el Rhyhorn de otro Entrenador, el bulbo en la espalda de Bulbasaur empieza a brillar. Ash lo lleva al Centro Pokémon del lugar. Pronto descubren que Bulbasaur no está enfermo, ¡se prepara para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En su camino hacia la Isla Cinnabar, nuestros héroes se unen con la Oficial Jenny y con el Growlithe de la fuerza policíaca en un entrenamiento especial, esperando mejorar las habilidades de batalla de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En un breve descanso para almorzar, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Todd Snap, un fotógrafo Pokémon que intenta conseguir una toma perfecta de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que hace tiempo que no gana ninguna Medalla de Gimnasio, Ash se inscribe al Examen de Admisión de la Liga Pokémon, ¡una gran oportunidad para demostrar que puede convertirse en un Maestro Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y los chicos deciden visitar un centro de crianza que vieron en un comercial. Sin embargo, el centro encubre un plan diabólico de los miembros del Equipo Rocket, Butch y Cassidy, ¡viejos rivales de Jessie y James!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Misty y Jessie compiten para ser la Reina del Festival de la Princesa! Ash y Brock le prestan a Misty sus Pokémon para la batalla, y Jessie es derrotada a pesar de su Pokémon sorpresa.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Es Día del Niño, y Ash y sus amigos ayudan a unos niños de una escuela a celebrarlo. El Equipo Rocket arruina la diversión llevándose a un niño en vez de a Pikachu. En un asombroso giro de eventos, Meowth se vuelve bueno… ¿o no?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes viajan a la Isla Cinnabar, donde Ash busca ganar la Medalla Volcán. Un extraño les dice acertijos para llegar al Gimnasio, ¡donde Ash y Pikachu tienen una feroz batalla con un Pokémon que nunca habían visto!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash finalmente localiza el Gimnasio, ¡suspendido sobre una piscina de lava fundida! Sólo un fuerte Pokémon tipo Fuego puede ayudarlo en esta batalla por la Medalla Volcán, así que Ash debe confiar en su malcriado Charizard.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: RiffTrax: Son Of Sinbad
programme.desc: Howard Hughes found time between cataloging his urine jar collection to produce a film about the Son of Sinbad! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zindy The Swamp Boy
programme.desc: Riding the end of the great Swamp Boy movie craze of the early 70s, Zindy the Swamp Boy effectively ended the genre. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: John Travolta plays Todd Lubitch, a boy who was born without any immunities and cannot venture outside his sterile environment, lest he slip on a banana peel and end up on America's Funniest Home Videos.

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Frankenstein's Daughter
programme.desc: Scientists try to cure all disease and instead make monsters! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Trucker's Woman
programme.desc: If the old dusty carousel of audio cassettes at a truck stop could be distilled into a movie, this would be that movie. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Catwomen of the Moon
programme.desc: MST3K stars Bridget Nelson and Mary Jo Pehl, under the RiffTrax Presents banner, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 1950's space adventure classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary

programme.title: RiffTrax: Devil Girl From Mars
programme.desc: Pour a glass of scotch and join Bridget and Mary Jo as they riff this Sci Fi classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Bridget and Mary Jo from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Girl From Rio
programme.desc: The Girl From Rio is about the island nation of Femina, which is inhabited by superwomen. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Sherlock Holmes and the Woman in Green
programme.desc: Originally in black and white, the woman The Woman in Green was difficult to identify — but because of the wonder of colorization, Bridget and Mary Jo figure out who's wearing green almost immediately! The rest of the mystery is elementary.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente está sangrando internamente por un embarazo ectópico, pero niega haber tenido relaciones sexuales, por lo que su médico debe encontrar una manera inteligente de probar su embarazo antes de poder tratarla.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una paciente no puede recordar los últimos 20 años de su vida, pero para tratarla sus médicos necesita saber desesperadamente lo que ha olvidado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos luchan por salvar a un joven traído a urgencias congelado y sin pulso; un hombre se enferma de muerte mientras asiste a su propia fiesta de aniversario.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El cantante de ópera Jason Black es cortado en el cuello por una lámina de vidrio rota y casi muere. El doctor Paul Castillo oye estallidos de disparos en la sala de espera y debe salvar a un oficial disparado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente se presenta con un fuerte dolor de cabeza, luego le salen hematomas en las piernas y su médico no tiene idea por qué.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una dama de honor se encuentra en un coma peligroso; el globo ocular de un hombre sale de su cabeza; un bebé prematuro es abandonado en el baño del hospital y debe ser revivido rápidamente en la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una paciente llega con parálisis en las piernas, que misteriosamente se extiende hasta los brazos mientras su novio la observa horrorizado; un niño es aplastado por un cuatrimotor y el hospital no cuenta con el equipo adecuado para tratarlo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre con una lesión en la mano se desmaya por un dolor abdominal, las pruebas conducen a un descubrimiento impactante; la hija separada de un paciente ayuda a resolver el misterio de sus síntomas mortales.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre es llevado a urgencias con una barra de 16 pulgadas que sobresale de su cuello; los médicos intentan descubrir cómo pueden eliminarlo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre entra en shock anafiláctico; un tipo rudo teme a las agujas; un hombre se apuñala con una espada ninja; Un paciente cree que necesita un exorcismo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Durante un partido de fútbol en la escuela secundaria, Jarret Hitchings, de 17 años, lleva el casco de un oponente al intestino. El Dr. César Aristeiguieta debe confiar en su entrenamiento previo como oficial de policía para ayudar.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña, recientemente golpeada por un disco de hockey, ahora está misteriosamente paralizada de cintura para abajo; un joven se queja de un terrible dolor de cabeza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un jugador de fútbol adolescente sufre un derrame cerebral en la sala de emergencias; un médico de renombre relata su primer gran trauma como residente en la década de 1970.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Effects of passing through a wormhole give the Enterprise crew a sense that they were unconscious for more than the thirty seconds they've been led to believe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander William Riker has been on an acculturation mission under an alias for months on the Arkonian planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise is in a star-base, Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge gets a very special visitor, brilliant engineering designer Dr. Leah Brahms, who he feels to know almost intimately as a 'hologram version' of herself with 'whom' he bonded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise has finally tracked the missing starship USS Britain. Counselor Deanna Troi senses trouble with the life on board and joins Riker's boarding party.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge and an old friend fight to defeat a parasite that is trying to transform them into another species.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Paris is convicted of a murder he swears he didn't commit, Tuvok must play detective to clear him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kim confronts life and death issues when he's held against his will by an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An alien leader has the technology that could send the crew 40,000 light years closer to home -- but refuses to share it with them.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew realizes there's a traitor on board after Federation technology turns upon an enemy warship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway sends the ship's doctor on his first Away Mission: rescue the crew members who have vanished in the holodeck's version of Beowulf.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An encounter with a strange nebula leaves Chakotay brain-dead and the crew battling a powerful force that seems to be taking over their minds.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's half-human, half-Klingon Chief Engineer Torres is split into two beings by a scientist desperate to cure the plague that's destroying his people.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A painful chapter in Neelix's past is reopened when the man responsible for killing his family beams aboard Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok incurs the wrath of Maquis crewmembers when he's put in charge of a "boot camp" designed to bring them up to Starfleet standards.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew explores a remote planet inhabited by humans who were abducted by aliens in 1937

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay faces an unlikely enemy: a Kazon boy who hopes to achieve warrior status by killing him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship's holographic doctor experiences a world where illusion and reality collide.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship is surrounded by creatures whose presence accelerates Kes' reproductive process and threatens Voyager's key operating systems.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ensign Harry Kim awakens on Earth, where he's shocked to learn there's no record of his assignment on Voyager.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a mission to Tollana, O'Neill steals a weapon there and takes it back to Earth. When Hammond discovers the deception, he suspends O'Neill. But O'Neill's misconduct is only the beginning of a deep mystery that could have catastrophic consequences.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 journeys to a planet where their arrival ignites a war between two cultures. A spy realizes his side could win the war if SG-1 and the Stargate can be neutralized. Will O'Neill and his team make the same realization and save themselves in time?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Bra'tac (Tony Amendola) arrives at Stargate Command with a wild story about interplanetary warfare with Apophis (Peter Williams). Daniel deduces that the battle is over Apophis' child, and races to save the child before Apophis can find him first.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel finds a crystal skull identical to one first discovered by his grandfather. When Daniel stares into the skull's eyes, a force makes him disappear. Now SG-1 must find his grandfather to unlock the mystery of the skull and bring Daniel home.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill is kidnapped by the Asgard and encounters a swarm of vicious metallic bug-like creatures on a mission to destroy Earth. O'Neill plans to blow up the ship and sacrifice himself, but can the team find another way to stop this apocalyptic plan?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is called upon to help a race of gentle, highly-intelligent aliens struggling against a swarm of deadly mechanical spiders called Replicators. But the situation becomes much more complicated when a lone Replicator is discovered back on Earth.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 responds to a cry for help from a doomed civilization, which promises to give Earthlings access to advanced technology in exchange for supplies that would help them defeat their enemies. But they soon discover that SG-1 may not be helping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is selected to test the effects of alien-tech wristbands on human wearers, and soon find themselves blessed with spectacular strength and speed. But when they are sent on a mission utilizing these new abilities, they learn a shocking lesson.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a High Priestess from the planet Chulak claims to have a plan that would cripple the Goa'uld, everyone is skeptical. SG-1 must join forces with the Tok'ra in order to put her plan into effect, but a deadly, hidden secret could jeopardize it.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When an SGC soldier under the influence of a Goa'uld mind-control device attempts to assassinate a High Council member, SG-1 must uncover other potential assassins, even amongst themselves, before the president arrives for a crucial Summit meeting!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After a visit to a strange planet in the middle of a geomagnetic storm they find themselves repeating the same day over and over again. The team must utilize their accumulated knowledge to stop the time loop before there are disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with a Russian scientist to investigate a rogue Stargate in Siberia, linked to a mysterious water planet. The team must venture via submarine to the water planet, where they encounter an unexpectedly terrifying alien presence.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During an archaeological survey of fossils on a Goa'uld planet, Daniel is abducted by a fearsome creature, prompting SG-1 to embark on a mission to free him. But Daniel soon learns that the creature's intentions are not what he thought!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After relocating an endangered civilization to a safe new planet, the team realizes that another race of aliens is planning to incinerate the planet's surface to make it inhabitable. Will SG-1 be able to reason with the marauding aliens?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance – and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s winter and the pond’s frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band called Strawberry Jams

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years – and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After an accidental wager with Purple Pieman, Strawberry sets off to prove that she can go around the world in 80 days.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On his way to Berry Big City to open a home for stray dogs, Huckleberry Pie’s Pet-Mobile gets stuck. He is rescued by Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry entices Huckleberry to come for a visit by asking him to team up and write a mystery story for an online mystery magazine.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry’s Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by the online mystery magazine, Strawberry comes up with a new way to raise funds for Huckleberry’s pet shelter—a big dog show!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Drafted by the girls to play Prince Berry Charming in a community play, Huck pushes aside his reluctance and tries to not disappoint them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huckleberry pitch their new play, an adaptation of the Berrykin Kids’ favorite BerryFairyTale 'The Littlest Berrykin' to their friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the entire town results in a repair crew of Berrykins invading the town with jackhammers.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The moon is gone, and the villagers can't sleep without his friendly “goodnight, sweet dreams!” // When Thunderbell adds too much bubble bath to his tub, he is trapped in a giant soap bubble.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby becomes an architect to help redesign Felicia's house after it accidentally gets destroyed by Gina. // Gina brings a machine to make rainbow sorbet for everyone.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Thunderbell discovers an unknown, delicious fruit, he eats up all of it at once. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When three little stars run away to Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes an astronaut to return them safely to space. // When Kiki breaks a gem given to her by Prince Frederick, she doesn't get a chance to see its special sparkle.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Annie Oatmeal hires both Strawberry Shortcake and Angel Cake to work at her dude ranch.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of L. Frank Baum’s classic 'Wonderful Wizard of Oz' – told from Pupcake’s point of view.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there’s an environmental disaster in the works.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the town keeps the girls from doing their work—to the frustration of Cherry Jam, who is struggling to write a song.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Unable to sleep with the noise of an all-night construction crew of Berrykins trying to get the power turned back on, Strawberry and the girls go on a campout.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While building a new Dog Park, Huck finds the Good Luck Charm that Cherry wrongly believes gives her the ability to sing difficult notes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan an elegant afternoon tea party to inaugurate the town’s new dog park, but encounter a mystery when the guests of honor, their puppies, strangely refuse to enter, and no one can figure out why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry invites Huck to attend Berry Bitty City’s big Masquerade Ball in honor of their new dog park. A screwball comedy of errors ensues when Blueberry gets a cold and has to stay home.

programme.desc: Ali's MRI comes back negative to the relief of Leah. Jenelle juggles finding peace with her mom and dealing with Kieffer's domestic charges. Kailyn tries a new form of birth control. Chelsea fends for herself after surgery.

programme.desc: Kailyn adjusts to being alone for the holidays. Jenelle regrets filing charges against Kieffer. Leah works to make the holidays special for the twins. Chelsea and Adam make up but Randy bans Adam from the holiday celebration.

programme.desc: Ali may have a genetic disorder. Jenelle and Kieffer must face court for their breaking and entering charges. Chelsea finds out that her old friend is pregnant. Kailyn gets annoyed when she notices Jo's not around for Issac.

programme.desc: Jenelle moves in with her friend after fighting with Barb, and Kieffer reenters the picture. Chelsea's relationship with Adam is going downhilll. Ali may still have a genetic problem. Jo confronts Kailyn about child support.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de Emilio muchas cosas han cambiado en la Arboleda del Monte. Modesto recibe su lugar dentro de la familia. Pasan seis meses, ya todos están más organizados. Rosa regresa a la casa y le dice a Miguel que todo ha terminado.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan está pendiente de Paula y su embarazo, ella está a punto de dar a luz. Julieta regresa al pueblo con José muy cambiada, y continúa con la idea de vengarse de Paula y matarla. Lucas, Amador y Gaspar atrapan a Nacho y lo llevan a la comisaría.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza cobra la herencia y luego finge su muerte. Ricardo está devastado y Aníbal trata de cobrar la fortuna de su exesposa. Gabriela quiere pagarle a Lucho para que se vaya y él, a cambio, le declara su amor. Gabriela declara su odio a sus enemigos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La declaración de Lucho conmueve a Gabriela, pero ella le advierte que no puede amar a nadie. Gabriela comienza su transformación en la nueva patrona: Verónica Dantés. Gastón llega como el abanderado de la nueva señora y le ofrece ayuda a Aníbal.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La Patrona no quiere que Lucho hable más del hombre que una vez amó. Alejandro recibe una invitación para conocer a Verónica Dantés, una poderosa mujer que despierta la curiosidad de todos. Francisca cree que es mejor seguir viviendo en su casa.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven teams take off from Los Angeles, California on race around the world, starting with a stop in Valparaiso, Chile, where a high-wire walk Roadblock tests the mettle of several racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The ten remaining teams depart Palacio Baburizza in Valparaiso, Chile, taking a lengthy bus trip to Puerto Varas.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Gruta de la Virgen in Puerto Varas, Chile for Bariloche, Argentina.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams are transported from the Pit Stop at the Indra Club in Hamburg, Germany's red-light district to a mystery location in France.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop in Champagne Ardenne, France and fly to the Seychelles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop on the Seychellian island of Praslin and fly to Penang, Malaysia, heading to the Snake Palace.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: This season's racers are introduced and for the first time in the history of The Amazing Race, the team to finish in first place will be awarded a surprise, game-changing advantage.

programme.desc: Andy dissuades a visiting farmer from marrying Barney's girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses his wits to help a struggling salesman stay in Mayberry despite strong pressure from the competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee becomes warden for a day when she disciplines Otis Campbell after he is arrested for his usual drunken behavior.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is forced to exert all his persuasiveness to get a farmer to take a tetanus shot.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney visit the big city and help to catch a notorious jewel thief in the process.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee begins dating the dry cleaner because she wants to give Andy space to pursue his own relationships.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney learns the hard way that three’s a crowd, when Andy and Mary Simpson try to find time alone together.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd expands his barbershop with the addition of a second barber. The new barber turns out to be a gambling bookie that Barney and Andy must catch in the act.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is put on trial for his law enforcement practices when a Raleigh newspaper reporter writes a damaging article about the lawman.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.desc: Tom Silva kicks off the season of Ask This Old House by helping transform stock shelving into a custom built-in. Richard Trethewey installs a new washing machine valve that will prevent flooding.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2004 Floyd Mayweather fought DeMarcus Corley at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Light Welterweight Title eliminator with Corely going down in round 8 and round 10 resulting in a win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Hector Arroyo
programme.desc: On January 9th, 1998, Floyd Mayweather fought Hector Arroyo in a featherweight bout in Biloxi, Mississippi. A young Mayweather hungry for a title shot came out quick against Arroyo, stopping him in the fifth round of the fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Larry O'Shields
programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)
programme.desc: The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)

programme.title: Transformers: Energon (eps 1-51)

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.desc: Freddie's in need of some guy time, so he tags along with Spencer to go fencing. Freddie's a natural, but things get complicated when Spencer gets him involved in a match with the amazing Doug Toder.

programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Spencer accidentally sets fire to Carly's presents, she wishes that she had a normal brother. A Christmas angel shows Carly what her life would be like.
